blockers.title: Resolve migration, deletion, whitelist, and post-merge proof inventory before final completion
evidence: docs/arnold/m5-pipeline-disposition.md: closed disposition table with no whitelist rows and explicit M6 fates
docs/arnold/m5-cli-command-mapping.md, m5-generated-artifact-manifest.md, m5-script-tool-inventory.md, m5-package-build-inventory.md, m5-legacy-test-inventory.md
docs/arnold/m6-deletion-list.md: every deletion traced to an M5 inventory outcome
scripts/check_workflow_pipeline_inventory.py: discovered shipped roots are all listed and migrated roots pass forbidden-pattern scans
scripts/validate_package_disposition.py: disposition YAML matches tracked files with no undecided rows
scripts/m6_purge_gate.py: legacy-constructor / __all__ / test-keepalive scans pass

blockers.title: Run merge-result rebuild, installed-wheel conformance, deletion integrity, and generated-artifact freshness gates after all milestone merges
evidence: .github/workflows/ci.yml: merge-result-conformance job rebuilds wheel/sdist and runs generator, registry, purge, blocker, and wheel-smoke gates

tests/installed_wheel/test_m6_import_failures.py: wheel/sdist install, deleted import failures, RECORD/namelist audit, sdist member audit, entry-point scan, CLI help scan, and full runtime import-tracing probes
scripts/generate_arnold_docs.py --check: generated artifacts are up to date
scripts/check_pipeline_id_registry.py --no-drift --check-identity-report: registry hashes match compiled manifests and identity report is current
scripts/m6_purge_gate.py: deletion integrity scans pass
docs/arnold/manifest-identity-report.json: committed merge-result identity report

blockers.title: Instrument importlib, __import__, lazy __getattr__, __all__, entrypoint loading, and handler registration against deleted legacy paths
evidence: tests/installed_wheel/test_m6_import_failures.py::test_installed_runtime_import_tracing_lacks_deleted_prefixes wraps builtins.__import__, importlib.import_module, importlib.metadata.entry_points/distribution/EntryPoint.load, and package __getattr__ to detect any dynamic load of deleted prefixes

tests/installed_wheel/test_m6_import_failures.py::test_m6_deleted_public_imports_fail_in_installed_wheel and test_sdist_install_deleted_surfaces_fail verify dynamic import of deleted prefixes raises ModuleNotFoundError

tests/arnold/conformance/test_conformance_gates.py::test_dynamic_import_paths_fail_for_deleted_megaplan_surfaces and test_eval_exec_cannot_resolve_deleted_megaplan_paths enforce dynamic/eval failure for deleted paths
scripts/m6_purge_gate.py: AST scans for __all__, _SYMBOL_EXPORTS, top-level wrappers, and import statements that keep legacy constructors alive
tests/installed_wheel/test_m6_import_failures.py::test_entry_points_lack_deleted_modules validates console scripts do not reference deleted modules

blockers.title: Freeze and resolve all legacy allowlist rows before M6 merge; merge-review rechartering requires independent evidence
evidence: docs/arnold/m5-pipeline-disposition.md: explicit 'whitelist rows are not present in this milestone; every shipped root has a deterministic disposition'
arnold/conformance/_megaplan_coupling_allowlist.txt: ratchet allowlist reduced to 5 concrete generic-Arnold modules, annotated with owner (Platform) and expiry (2026-12-31)
docs/arnold/m6-deletion-list.md: Phase B notes conformance allowlists were burned down, expanded to concrete files, and annotated with owner/expiry/non-legacy rationale

scripts/check_workflow_pipeline_inventory.py ARCHIVAL_ALLOWLIST: concrete list of legacy runtime shells and migration docs excluded from forbidden-pattern scans, with rationale in code comments and disposition docs
scripts/m6_purge_gate.py LEGACY_TEST_KEEPALIVE_DIR_ALLOWLIST: concrete archive/fixture/installed-wheel directories with documented purpose
